chat_welcome_subtitle: How can I help you today?
chat_error_cli_not_found: Claude CLI not found. Install it with: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
editor_placeholder: Editor will be implemented in Phase 3
editor_placeholder_body: Start writing or type / for commands
property_pii_git_history_hint: Private data stays in Git history.
property_dialog_add_column_desc: Choose a type, name it, and define options when needed.
property_dialog_change_type_desc: Values will be converted where possible. Values that cannot be converted are preserved for manual cleanup.
property_dialog_status_groups: Assign each option to a status group.
property_dialog_rename_column_desc: Collection entries and view references will be migrated atomically.
property_dialog_delete_column_desc: The property “{name}” will be removed from the schema. Values can be preserved as orphan YAML.
property_dialog_rename_option_desc: Existing values in collection entries will be migrated.
property_dialog_delete_option_desc: The option “{name}” will be removed from the schema.
property_dialog_delete_option_values: Also clear this value in entries
doc_link_clone_missing_description: This document is in the space {name}, which has not been cloned yet. Clone it now?
home_empty_description: Documents, smart tables, teams and AI agents — all in one place. Your data is stored locally as Git repositories.
home_open_project_error: Could not open this folder as a project
home_project_already_exists: This folder is already a Svode project. Opening it instead.
project_delete_description: The project will be removed from the list. Spaces will remain on disk.
project_empty_description: Create a page or choose an existing document from the sidebar.
scope_home_empty_description: Add README.md to turn this scope home into a document.
inbox_empty_description: Notifications and attention items will appear here.
sessions_empty_description: Agent sessions will appear here when they are available.
space_add_first_description: A space is a place for documents with an AI agent that knows the entire context and helps at every stage.
space_delete_description: The space will be removed from the project. Files will remain on disk.
file_delete_tree_description: This document and everything inside it will be deleted.
file_delete_collection_description: This collection, its schema, and all entries inside it will be deleted.
file_delete_has_backlinks: The following documents link to this one:
updates_release_available_desc: Download the latest dogfood release from GitHub.
updates_ci_build_available_desc: A platform-specific dogfood build is ready.
updates_no_updates: You're on the latest dogfood build
settings_profile_git_identity_hint: Stored in ~/.gitconfig. Used for every commit across Svode. Per-project override: Space Settings → Git → Identity.
settings_mcp_pii_warning_description: External agent tools can read and write current project data, including PII. Svode does not add a redaction or permission layer for MCP tools in this alpha.
settings_mcp_explicit_action_hint: Installing an MCP config is an explicit user action. Connect only agents and projects you intend to share with those tools.
settings_mcp_manual_config_description: Use this JSON if automatic install is unavailable.
settings_unsaved_description: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
settings_spaces_description: Manage child spaces for this project.
settings_spaces_empty: This project has no child spaces yet.
settings_project_policy_spaces_descripti: Inline spaces inherit the project policy. Separate repositories and submodules are changed only through their explicit detail screen.
settings_system_prompt_placeholder: Custom instructions for the AI agent
settings_health_broken_links_desc: Revalidated after documents are opened or backlinks are rebuilt.
settings_space_default_model_desc: Model used by default in the chat composer
git_missing_description: Svode stores data as Git repositories. Install git to continue.
git_missing_instructions_macos:
brew install git
# or install Xcode Command Line Tools:
xcode-select --install
git_missing_instructions_windows:
winget install --id Git.Git -e
# or download the installer:
https://git-scm.com/download/win
git_missing_instructions_linux:
sudo apt install git           # Debian/Ubuntu
sudo dnf install git           # Fedora
sudo pacman -S git             # Arch
space_folder_invalid: Use one folder name with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores
space_pii_independent_hint: For customer, contacts, or other personal data, use a separate space/repository.
git_clone_url_hint: Leave empty for a new space
git_save_current_clean: No changes in the current document
git_save_current_clean_scope: No changes in the current document. {scope} has {count} change(s) — use {shortcut}
git_save_no_surface: Nothing to save on the current screen
git_save_no_surface_scope: Nothing to save on the current screen. {scope} has {count} change(s) — use {shortcut}
git_auto_sync_hint: Personal on this device. Pull + push on every ⌘S/⌘⇧S. Disable if working offline.
git_auto_commit_manual_hint: Personal on this device. Content changes stay dirty until ⌘S/⌘⇧S. These switches only allow background commits for repository automation.
git_auto_commit_structural_hint: Project and space creation, clone registration, scaffold, lifecycle .gitignore updates, and submodule pointer updates.
git_auto_commit_system_hint: Space config, existing .gitignore repairs, remote URL, assets strategy, agent instructions, and CLI integration.
git_sync_modal_description: Pull incoming commits and push local commits on {branch}.
git_sync_auto_label: Sync future commits automatically on this device
git_sync_auto_hint: Uses the same personal auto-sync setting as Git Settings.
git_sync_error_description: Last sync failed. Counts show the last verified remote refs.
git_sync_remote_unchecked_description: Could not refresh remote refs. Counts are hidden until Git can reach the remote.
git_sync_auth_required: Git authentication required. Configure credential helper.
storage_strategy_in_git_desc: Files stored in repository history (for small files)
storage_strategy_lfs_remote_desc: Files stored on the Git provider (GitHub, GitLab)
storage_strategy_lfs_s3_desc: Files stored in an S3-compatible bucket
storage_lfs_install_hint: Install: macOS: brew install git-lfs && git lfs install · Windows: https://git-lfs.com · Linux: sudo apt install git-lfs && git lfs install
storage_s3_prefix_hint: Generated once for this repository and does not change when the project or space is renamed.
storage_s3_test_needs_keys: Enter access and secret key to test
storage_s3_creds_hint: Existing credentials are stored in your OS keychain. Enter new keys only to replace them.
storage_confirm_description: Switching to "{strategy}" will update repository storage config without rewriting Git history.
storage_confirm_files: Svode may update .svode/config.json, .gitignore, .gitattributes, local Git LFS config, and strategy-specific credentials.
storage_confirm_existing_assets: {count} existing asset file(s) will become syncable pending changes in the current working tree. Commit or sync explicitly to publish them.
storage_confirm_locked: After enabling a sync strategy, switching back or changing strategy is blocked until the migration flow is implemented.
storage_migration_unsupported: Changing an active storage strategy requires a dedicated migration flow.
storage_migration_unsupported_hint: Only Local only → sync strategy enrollment is supported in this patch.
storage_count_failed: Could not inspect existing assets. Storage strategy was not changed.
identity_dialog_description: Svode uses git for every project. Commits need a name and email.
identity_load_error_description: Svode could not read git config. Check the developer console and try again.
settings_git_identity_project_scope: Used for commits in the {name} project repository. This does not change your Svode account or global Git config.
settings_git_identity_repository_scope: Used for commits in the {name} repository. Changes apply only to this space repository.
settings_git_identity_summary_hint: Svode resolves the active author before each repository commit.
settings_git_identity_partial_hint: One field is overridden locally and the other is resolved from Git config.
settings_git_identity_set_project: Set identity for this project repository
settings_git_identity_override_helper: Leave both fields empty to use global Git identity. Filling both fields writes repo-local user.name and user.email.
settings_git_identity_project_edit_hint: This writes Git identity for the root project repository only. Nested repositories are updated only when selected below.
settings_git_identity_repository_edit_hi: Changes apply only to this space repository and do not change the root project or other spaces.
settings_git_identity_missing_descriptio: Set a repository override or configure global Git identity before Svode creates commits here.
settings_git_identity_missing_edit_descr: Global Git identity is missing, so empty override fields will still leave this repository without commit identity.
settings_git_identity_missing_save_error: Fill both name and email, or configure global Git identity first.
settings_git_identity_nested_description: Independent and submodule repositories do not inherit root project Git config automatically. Selected repositories will be updated by an explicit batch write.
settings_git_identity_override_hint: Leave empty to inherit. Both fields are required when overriding.
settings_git_identity_both_required: Fill both name and email, or leave both empty
storage_inherited_hint: Inline spaces share the project's storage strategy. Change it in the project settings.
storage_project_setting_differs_hint: This repository keeps its own storage setting until you explicitly use the project setting or choose another local strategy.
storage_project_setting_s3_hint: S3 credentials are checked per repository. The project setting fills endpoint, bucket, and region; then save credentials for this repository.
storage_project_setting_loaded: Project setting loaded. Review credentials and save.
storage_used_by_inline_spaces_none: No inline spaces use this strategy yet.
storage_lfs_banner_missing_s3_title: S3 credentials needed to load binaries
storage_lfs_banner_missing_s3_desc: Enter the S3 access key and secret key for the configured bucket. Existing settings are kept; only credentials are updated.
storage_lfs_banner_missing_remote_title: The Git LFS server requires authentication
storage_lfs_banner_missing_remote_desc: The system git credential helper (or your ssh-agent) will prompt for credentials.
storage_lfs_remote_setup_desc: Svode stores LFS objects on the Git remote provider. No S3 endpoint or provider credentials are stored in Svode.
storage_lfs_remote_ready_desc: The Git LFS endpoint is reachable with the current Git authentication.
storage_lfs_remote_req_provider: Git LFS is enabled on the provider
storage_lfs_remote_req_auth: Git auth is available through a credential helper or ssh-agent
storage_lfs_remote_git_lfs_missing: Install git-lfs and run git lfs install, then retry.
storage_lfs_remote_missing_remote: No origin remote is configured. Set a Git remote in Git settings first.
storage_lfs_remote_auth_required_https: Credentials are missing or rejected. Svode cannot open an interactive credential prompt from this window; run the command below in a terminal so Git can use your credential helper, then retry.
storage_lfs_remote_auth_required_ssh: SSH authentication is missing or rejected. Make sure your key is loaded in ssh-agent, then retry.
storage_lfs_remote_lfs_unavailable: The remote responded, but Git LFS looks disabled or unsupported for this repository. Enable Git LFS on the provider, then retry.
storage_lfs_remote_probe_failed: Svode could not verify the Git LFS endpoint. Review the Git output, fix remote/auth/provider setup, then retry.
view_query_unknown_field: This field is no longer available.
view_query_group_editor_description: Entries will be collected by values of this property.
view_query_confirm_save_changed: Shared view changed. Save your local query over it?
view_query_filter_notice: Filters change only what is visible in this view.
view_query_sort_notice: Manual reorder is disabled while explicit sorting is active.
view_query_group_notice: Grouping is available for board views.
view_query_filter_no_value_needed: This operator does not need a value.
view_query_shared_changed_notice: Shared view changed; your local query is still applied.
view_query_local_notice: Local query changes are visible only to you until saved.
collection_document_tab_description: Changes only the document tab name. The file and content are not renamed.
collection_view_composer_pending: Entry composer arrives with concrete views
collection_properties_notice: Visibility is saved in this view configuration. Entry values stay unchanged.
collection_no_groupable_fields: No status, select, or actor properties
collection_view_type_notice: Compatible properties and query settings are kept where possible.
collection_properties_pending: Property visibility and add-column controls are shared with concrete views.
collection_filter_shortcut_hint: Use the Filter button for query editing.
collection_sort_shortcut_hint: Use the Sort button for query editing.
collection_group_hint: Grouping applies to board views first.
collection_add_group_property: Add select, status, or actor property
entry_convert_leaf_blocked: Folder contains {subpages} subpages, {files} other file(s) — move them out first
board_no_groupable_title: Board needs a status, select, or actor property.
calendar_no_date_field_title: Calendar view needs a date property.
table_error_description: The details were written to the developer console.
table_delete_column_confirm: Delete this column? Values will remain in files.
table_delete_column_affected: {count} entries contain a value for this column.
table_property_type_notice: Choose a type — a new column will be added to the table.
property_relation_orphan_tooltip: Linked entry not found. The target may have been deleted or moved externally.
property_relation_out_of_scope_tooltip: Linked entry is outside the related collection.
property_relation_schema_warning_desc: The reverse relation pair is not valid.
property_relation_convert_warning: {count} entries could not be converted to relation. Values were left in {field}.
collection_delete_view_description: This removes the saved view configuration. Entries stay in the collection.
editor_frontmatter_malformed_warning: Frontmatter YAML is malformed. The document opened as markdown content; metadata edits are disabled until the YAML is repaired.
